name: Alex — The Context-Switching PM
jobsToBeDone: Stop losing context when switching between Slack, Linear, and Notion mid-sprint
Know at a glance which team member is blocked, without asking in Slack
Export a clean sprint report for stakeholders in under 5 minutes

thinkingStyle.boundaryDefinition: Separates 'planning work' from 'doing work' mentally; gets frustrated when tools blur this boundary
thinkingStyle.timeOrientation: Thinks in 2-week sprint cycles; past-focused for blockers, future-focused for capacity
thinkingStyle.socialProcessing: Processes priorities alone before team sync; does not like being put on the spot
